name: Guacamole Crudo
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh tomato, seeded and cut into 1/4 inch dice
4 tablespoons chili salsa, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the avocados and remove any seeds.
2. Cut the avocados into 1/4-inch dice and toss with lemon juice.
3. Add finely chopped onion, stemmed and chopped cilantro, diced tomatoes, chili salsa, and garlic salt to the avocado dice.
4. Toss all ingredients together gently, being careful not to bruise the avocados.
5. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
